task_description: Phase 2 - Decoupling Logic: Refactor the terminal-based Java RPG into MVC architecture with clean model/events/controller separation. Remove all System.out and Scanner usage from game logic. Create event system for view communication. Make game loop non-blocking for future libGDX integration.

verification.summary: Full project compiles with javac (16 files, zero errors). Zero System.out, Scanner, or Thread.sleep in any source file. All game mechanics preserved. Post-implementation review v2 verdict: APPROVED. Central event bus, safe dispatch, proper Random usage all verified.
